gold: Tôi là mất thẻ. Tuần trước, tôi có xin cấp lại thẻ. Không biết hiện tại tình trạng thẻ như thế nào?
predicted: ờ tôi làm mất thẻ á, tuần trước có xin cấp lại thẻ á, không biết hiện tại là tình trạng thẻ như thế nào?
werNormalizedGold: toi la mat the tuan truoc toi co xin cap lai the khong biet hien tai tinh trang the nhu the nao
werNormalizedPredicted: toi lam mat the tuan truoc co xin cap lai the khong biet hien tai la tinh trang the nhu the nao
sigWerNormalizedGold: toi la mat the tuan truoc toi co xin cap lai the khong biet hien tai tinh trang the nhu the nao
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: toi lam mat the tuan truoc co xin cap lai the khong biet hien tai la tinh trang the nhu the nao

sigWerErrors.reason: 'la' (to be) and 'lam' (to do/make) are different verbs in Vietnamese; this changes the meaning of the sentence significantly, as it shifts from 'I am' to 'I made/caused', which affects the subject's role in the action.
Omitting 'toi' (I) at this position removes the subject from the second clause, but the context still makes it clear who is being referred to, so the overall meaning is not derailed.
Inserting 'la' (to be) before 'tinh trang' (status) is a minor grammatical difference and does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
